TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_Kam, title = Kam, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kam} }

S.FORM: aicu a Kam (Kinaman: Gaeml, IPA: /k…źmň•/) zuku nuaya mavan na i Tailiku a kaizuanan. nasepaljavak tjai Tailiku, Vietnam, katjai Myanmar a Kam zuku. supu a supu nua Kam a caucau tucu, izua man 2,879,974 sakaizua, qau tjaljatjuruvuan a i pinui Tailikuan a Kam a caucau. pungadan a caucau Su Yu Lu Yong Li Ting pacunu uta Viet
S.PHON: ai ¶u a kam (kinaman: ga…ôm…≠, ipa: /k*m*/) zuku nuaja mavan na i tai…≠iku a kaizuanan. nas…ôpa éavak ¶ai tai…≠iku, vi…ôtnam, ka ¶ai mjanmar a kam zuku. supu a supu nua kam a ¶au ¶au tu ¶u, izua man *,***,*** sakaizua, qau ¶a éa ¶uruvuan a i pinui tai…≠ikuan a kam a ¶au ¶au. puŇčadan a ¶au ¶au su ju …≠u juŇč …≠i tiŇč pa ¶unu uta vi…ôt
S.FORM: aicu a Kam (Kinaman: Gaeml, IPA: /k…źmň•/) zuku nuaya mavan na i Tailiku a kaizuanan. nasepaljavak tjai Tailiku, Vietnam, katjai Myanmar a Kam zuku. supu a supu nua Kam a caucau tucu, izua man 2,879,974 sakaizua, qau tjaljatjuruvuan a i pinui Tailikuan a Kam a caucau. pungadan a caucau Su Yu Lu Yong Li Ting pacunu uta Viet
S.PHON: ai ¶u a kam (kinaman: ga…ôm…≠, ipa: /k*m*/) zuku nuaja mavan na i tai…≠iku a kaizuanan. nas…ôpa éavak ¶ai tai…≠iku, vi…ôtnam, ka ¶ai mjanmar a kam zuku. supu a supu nua kam a ¶au ¶au tu ¶u, izua man *,***,*** sakaizua, qau ¶a éa ¶uruvuan a i pinui tai…≠ikuan a kam a ¶au ¶au. puŇčadan a ¶au ¶au su ju …≠u juŇč …≠i tiŇč pa ¶unu uta vi…ôt
